title: Cover MeshCore ingress through gateway message contract
description: Reviews for project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2 noted Meshtastic gateway tests now exercise the production message_contract submit_text sink, but MeshCore gateway tests still inject a custom submit sink. Add no-hardware MeshCore gateway coverage that initializes/pops the gateway message contract queue for submit_text ingress.
notes:
Implemented MeshCore gateway message-contract coverage. The meshcore_gateway_adapter test target now links production apps/gateway/src/message_contract.c, resets the message-contract test state in reset_gateway(), and adds test_send_channel_text_enqueues_message_contract. The new native_sim test initializes gateway_message_contract_init(), sends a MeshCore SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG frame through fake BLE ingress, verifies OK response, pops the shared gateway_message_contract queue, asserts from=0, to=UINT32_MAX, has_id=false, has_to_iid=false, payload_len=4, payload=ping, then asserts the queue is empty with -ENOENT. Existing custom submit-sink tests remain for reentrancy/concurrency behavior.

Exploration/test design: Bacon mapped the production MeshCore submit_text path through meshcore_adapter.c -> lichen_app_interface_submit_text() -> message_contract.c and recommended keeping programmable custom sinks only for reentrancy tests. Volta designed the acceptance checks implemented here and called out single-submit-sink/reset-order risks.

Code reviews: Dalton found no issues in the edited MeshCore/message-contract files and only noted the unrelated untracked Renode _integration_test.resc file should not be committed. Euler found no blocking test-design issues and confirmed the test proves exactly one ingress event enters the message contract while custom-sink tests remain valid. Anscombe found no build integration/reset/static-state issues and independently observed an EC2 native_sim build/run passing 16/16 tests including the new test. No P0/P1/P2 findings.

Local checks: git diff --check passed.

EC2 validation: First attempted builder i-05a66666fff1de780 could not attach EBS because vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 was attached to another active review builder; cleaned up that failed builder, security group sg-0ae57d8d4b554c3dd, and key lichen-t2hn722-20260702090558. Validation worktree: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn722-validate from origin/main plus local patch. Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-meshcore-contract --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: 1 scenario/configuration selected and passed, 16 test cases executed, 0 skipped, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 27.59 seconds.
